mono.usage: Data tables, financial numbers, account IDs, and metric widgets

layout_spacing.grid_pattern: Control Room Grid (Dense but readable). Maximize pixel utilization without feeling cluttered.

components.cards: Clean white background, subtle border (border-slate-200), soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm). No heavy drop shadows. Keep edges crisp.
components.tables: Dense but highly legible. Use tabular-nums or IBM Plex Mono for numeric columns. Left-aligned text, right-aligned numbers. Subtle row hover effects.
components.sidebar: Collapsible left sidebar for global navigation. Use a dark navy background (#0F172A) with white text to anchor the application visually, creating a 'command center' feel.
components.topbar: Sticky header (z-50) with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) in light mode to maintain context while scrolling.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Implement custom styled tooltips matching card aesthetics. Muted grid lines. Distinct, color-blind friendly palettes using accent blues and cyans.

motion.hover: Subtle card lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow increase. Smooth background color transitions on interactive elements.
motion.page_transitions: Simple 0.2s fade-in for the main content area when switching routes to ensure an immediate, snappy enterprise feel.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric blue background for login page split screen

media.icons: Use lucide-react. For the fictional bank logo, DO NOT use a placeholder image. Instead, compose it using a Lucide icon (e.g., Landmark or ShieldCheck) alongside crisp typography (e.g., 'NexusBank').

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Text over primary solid buttons must be pure white. Avoid pale gray text on white backgrounds.
accessibility.testing_ids: Apply 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements, links, tabs, and critical metric wrappers.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a BI Dashboard for a retail bank. Tone is serious, enterprise, premium. Avoid playful shapes or extreme neon colors.
10 screens required: Login Page, Executive Dashboard, Deposit & CASA, Lending, Customer 360, Branch Performance, Digital Channel, Risk/Collections, Report Center, Navigation.
Implement simulated login flow leading into the dashboard layout.
For charts, strictly use Recharts. Ensure charts have ResponsiveContainer wrappers to fit grid items dynamically.
Add Dark Mode toggle and an 'Export to PDF' mock action button in the topbar or report center.
Use standard tailwind utility classes. Do not invent custom CSS unless absolutely necessary.
Integrate Google Fonts: 'Outfit' for all Headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for Body, 'IBM Plex Mono' for tabular data and KPIs.
Apply data-testid rigorously to all buttons, links, inputs, and chart wrappers to support automated testing.
Build a robust DashboardLayout containing the Sidebar and Topbar, rendering specific dashboard views inside an Outlet or children wrapper.
Make sure grid items align perfectly and utilize full height where necessary to avoid jagged bottoms in the control-room style layout.
